name: LubeLogger
description: A vehicle maintenance and fuel mileage tracker
compose:
name: slashnode-lubelogger
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/hargata/lubelogger:v1.6.8
    container_name: lubelogger
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/App/data
      - app_data-keys:/root/.aspnet/DataProtection-Keys
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8835:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-lubelogger_app_data-app
  app_data-keys:
    name: slashnode-lubelogger_app_data-keys
